name: Retail Investor Net Capital Loss Carryback and Worthless Shares
description: Complete Alex Mercer's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024, including Schedule 3, Schedule 4 (carrying charges), and Form T1A to carry back the maximum possible losses to 2021 and 2022. Save the return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\alex_mercer.24t.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T1A (Request for Loss Carryback) and Schedule 3
metadata.key_complexity: Net capital loss calculation (50% inclusion rate); T1A form entry for multiple prior years; Section 50(1) worthless shares election; Line 22100 carrying charges
